leadText: Schooling (Japanese: ぎょぐん Schooling) is an Ability introduced in Generation VII. It is the signature Ability of Wishiwashi.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] If Wishiwashi is level 20 or higher and its HP is above 25% when it is sent out or at the end of a turn, it will change into its School Form. At the end of a turn, if its HP is equal to 25% or below, it will change back to its Solo Form. Gastro Acid , Worry Seed , and Simple Beam fail if the target has the Ability Schooling. Role Play , Skill Swap , Entrainment , and Doodle fail if either Pokémon has Schooling. Schooling cannot be copied by Trace , Power of Alchemy , or Receiver . Schooling cannot be replaced by Mummy or Lingering Aroma , or suppressed by Core Enforcer or Neutralizing Gas . If a Pokémon other than Wishiwashi obtains Schooling with Imposter or Transform , the Pokémon will not change forms. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Schooling has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] If Wishiwashi is level 20 or higher and its HP is above 25% when it is sent out or at the end of a turn, it will change into its School Form. At the end of a turn, if its HP is equal to 25% or below, it will change back to its Solo Form. Gastro Acid , Worry Seed , and Simple Beam fail if the target has the Ability Schooling. Role Play , Skill Swap , Entrainment , and Doodle fail if either Pokémon has Schooling. Schooling cannot be copied by Trace , Power of Alchemy , or Receiver . Schooling cannot be replaced by Mummy or Lingering Aroma , or suppressed by Core Enforcer or Neutralizing Gas . If a Pokémon other than Wishiwashi obtains Schooling with Imposter or Transform , the Pokémon will not change forms.
